arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's Man City cavalry return to action ahead of fixture congestion as Erling Haaland sees off Brentford
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN AT THE ETIHAD: Guardiola was equally glad about first starts of the season for Walker, Stones and Gundogan, the return of Rodri and Phil Foden being back on the bench.

arts.ttl: Preview: Brentford vs. Leyton Orient - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Brentford and Leyton Orient, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
